title: INTC Call Options Doubled in Just 2 Days! Small Accounts Can Catch Opportunities Too.
author: No_Shallot_9540
selftext:
Took profits on my INTC calls today.

Picked up 30 $108 calls on June 5 for $1.94 each. Was looking for continuation after the breakout and figured the risk/reward was worth a shot.

Ended up selling today at $6.92.

Not gonna lie, I didn't expect a 250%+ move in a week.

Final numbers:

30 contracts

$1.94 → $6.92

\+$14,940

\+256.7%

The funny thing is people always ask about the gain, but I spent way more time thinking about the downside before I entered the trade.

Worst case, I lose the premium.

Best case, something like this happens.

Anyway, trade's closed and the money is in the account now.

comments.author: Vivid-Revolution-613
comments.body: Congrats and lemme know what u gonna buy next
